title: centaurium umbellatum subsp. transiens
intro: Centaurium umbellatum subsp. transiens, also known as the greater centaury, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the gentian family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an expectorant, helping to clear mucus from the lungs. The health benefits of this plant include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Centaurium umbellatum subsp. transiens can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or capsules for medicinal use, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional remedies.
